description: Resource type definition for AWS::SageMaker::TrialComponent. A trial component is a stage of a machine learning trial, such as a preprocessing job, training job, or batch transform job.

TrialComponentStatus.description: The status of the trial component.

PrimaryStatus.description: The status of the trial component.
PrimaryStatus.markdownDescription:
The status of the trial component.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: InProgress | Completed | Failed | Stopping | Stopped  
Update requires: No interruption

Message.description: If the component failed, a message describing why.
Message.markdownDescription:
If the component failed, a message describing why.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption

TrialComponentStatus.markdownDescription:
The status of the trial component.

---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

TrialComponentArtifact.description: Represents an input or output artifact of a trial component.

MediaType.description: The media type of the artifact.
MediaType.markdownDescription:
The media type of the artifact.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 64  
Pattern: ^[-\w]+\/[-\w+]+$  
Update requires: No interruption

Value.markdownDescription:
The location of the artifact.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 2048  
Update requires: No interruption

Represents an input or output artifact of a trial component.

TrialComponentArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the trial component.
TrialComponentArn.markdownDescription:
The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the trial component.

---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 256  
Pattern: ^arn:aws[a-z\-]*:sagemaker:[a-z0-9\-]*:[0-9]{12}:experiment-trial-component/  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

TrialComponentName.description: The name of the trial component. Must be unique in your AWS account and is not case-sensitive.
TrialComponentName.markdownDescription:
The name of the trial component. Must be unique in your AWS account and is not case-sensitive.

---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 120  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9](-*[a-zA-Z0-9]){0,119}$  
Update requires: Replacement

DisplayName.description: The name of the component as displayed. If DisplayName isn't specified, TrialComponentName is displayed.
DisplayName.markdownDescription:
The name of the component as displayed. If DisplayName isn't specified, TrialComponentName is displayed.
